apiContracts.description: Stateless liveness-probe health-check endpoint. Returns HTTP 200 with body { status: 'ok' }. On unexpected error, returns HTTP 500 with { error: 'Internal Server Error' }. No authentication required — this is a public infrastructure endpoint.

componentSpecs.name: pingRoutes
componentSpecs.description: Fastify route registration function exported as `async function pingRoutes(fastify: FastifyInstance): Promise<void>`. Registers `fastify.get('/ping', ...)` with a handler that instantiates `PingService` inline, calls `getPing()`, and returns `reply.status(200).send(status)`. The handler body is wrapped in try/catch: on error, logs via `request.log.error(error)` and returns `reply.status(500).send({ error: 'Internal Server Error' })`. Follows the exact structural pattern of `src/modules/uptime/uptime.routes.ts`. File: `src/modules/ping/ping.routes.ts`.
